name: co-dialectic
description: Co-Dialectic v4.18.0 - TASK-FIRST PERSONA ROUTING + ONBOARDING HINT. Adds skills/co-dialectic/task-persona-map.md so users describe tasks ('critique the UX', 'prioritize this') instead of remembering persona names. Status line shows task-first labels by default. New users get a 3-turn onboarding hint that explains the score/calibration metrics and task-routing pattern, then auto-fades. Resolves GH issues #8 (task-based persona routing) and #9 (first-time context for UI metrics).
_product_vs_solution_marker: product-vs-solution: example — Anand authorship attribution is legitimate
